creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I isolated this with tubsta on Twitter after a similar report from him [1] beginning of June. 

The issue is in psutil and all consumers are affected in the same way. I'll work with Kirill/upstream to get it sorted, and produce a patch we can carry until subsequent releases.

[1] https://twitter.com/Tubsta/status/1532236245740359680
